name: guru-sync-base
description: Resolve, safely synchronize, and deterministically validate the selected Git base before Guru Team reads repository task context or starts intake side effects.

entry_preconditions.evidence: installed extension manifest, dispatcher, managed package inventory and runtime commands
entry_preconditions.binding: complete compatible Guru Team preset runtime
entry_preconditions.freshness: validated by run-skill-command before each command

entry_preconditions.evidence: Git toplevel, current branch and HEAD
entry_preconditions.binding: the repository and checkout whose base freshness gates this invocation

entry_preconditions.evidence: canonical resolve-only stdout JSON facts, pre-sync resolution_sha256 and post_sync_resolution_sha256
entry_preconditions.binding: explicit, scalar config, ordered existing candidate or remote-default resolution inputs reused by sync-base and prepare-task
entry_preconditions.freshness: pre-sync digest match before fetch; each prepare guard reruns immediately before each GitHub/worktree/task mutation and returns the post-sync digest consumed by the next boundary

entry_preconditions.evidence: NUL-safe Git status before and after synchronization
entry_preconditions.binding: decision checkout has no tracked, untracked or staged changes
entry_preconditions.freshness: checked before fetch, before fast-forward and after synchronization

entry_preconditions.evidence: guru-base-sync-result-1.0 stdout JSON, pre/post resolution digests, facts_sha256 and live Git facts
entry_preconditions.binding: decision checkout, local base and remote-tracking base identity
entry_preconditions.freshness: objective validator matches current clean Git state

validators.objective_scope: strict four-level resolution, pre-sync digest binding, explicit refspec fetch, selected-checkout ff-only execution, post-sync resolution generation and three-way equality facts
Draft 2020-12 schema, pre/post resolution digests, facts digest, selected refs, clean checkout and live decision/local/remote HEAD equality

external_exits.evidence: validator-passed fresh stdout result facts carrying the post-sync resolution digest
caller-classified non-repo route plus validated stdout-only skipped recorder facts
resolution, Git or objective validation failure

reentry.identity: invocation mode, route id, repository identity, decision checkout, resolution source/base/remote/candidates, pre-sync resolution_sha256 and post_sync_resolution_sha256
reentry.freshness: each boundary consumes the preceding post-sync identity, emits the next identity, and matches clean live Git facts
